product.name: Burberry Long Silk Cotton Foxfield Trench Coat
selling_points: A fashionable and elegant long trench coat with a refined oatmeal beige silhouette.
High-quality silk-cotton faille tailoring with polished heritage details for a sophisticated look.

creative_strategy.core_pain: Feeling underdressed or generic when a moment calls for polished elegance and a refined silhouette.
creative_strategy.promise: A long, silk-cotton faille trench that instantly elevates your presence with luxurious drape, heritage detailing, and a sophisticated oatmeal beige tone.

creative_design.selected_category_reason: Premium best signals the coat’s luxury fabric, refined tailoring, and sophisticated silhouette through restrained staging, elegant light, and a poised on-body presentation.

candidate_categories.reason: Quiet, high-end presence highlights silk-cotton texture, silhouette, and tailoring without clutter.
candidate_categories.risk: Model consistency and fabric stability under soft motion.

candidate_categories.reason: Close-in compositions can show texture and stitch lines.
candidate_categories.risk: Tiny detail proofs may be too subtle for small open-source video models.

candidate_categories.reason: Contextual city or boutique scenes could suggest real-world sophistication.
candidate_categories.risk: Crowds, complex backgrounds, and walk cycles reduce stability and premium signal.

candidate_categories.reason: Little to 'prove' functionally; it is a fashion statement piece.
candidate_categories.risk: Forcing functional demos would feel contrived and visually minor.

candidate_categories.reason: Could dramatize glamour with stylized moves.
candidate_categories.risk: Risk of fabric warping or unrealistic motion undermining credibility.

creative_design.selling_angle: The refined oatmeal beige long trench in silk-cotton faille that reads instantly premium and editorial, making any entrance feel composed and sophisticated.
creative_design.visual_grammar: Editorial studio runway with a single poised model, warm commercial light, negative space, slow camera push-in, and a subtle body turn.
creative_design.proof_mechanism: On-body silhouette, controlled drape, and soft light revealing the silk-cotton faille surface and polished heritage details.
creative_design.hook_or_opening: Model already wearing the trench in a three-quarter pose under a warm spotlight on a minimal cream runway.
creative_design.action_arc: From a composed three-quarter stance, the model performs a slow, measured pivot toward camera as the camera gently pushes in.
creative_design.payoff: A front-facing composed hold that showcases the belted waist, collar, and long elegant line of the coat.
creative_design.feasibility_notes: Kept to one model, one scene, and one slow pivot to avoid fabric flutter or complex walking. No hand close-ups or belt-tying. Neutral runway set with soft, even lighting ensures material reads without relying on tiny details or logos.

character.appearance: A poised adult fashion model with an elegant, neutral expression and balanced proportions.
character.wardrobe: The Burberry long trench worn fully belted; simple neutral underlayers that do not compete; understated nude or beige heels.
character.hair_makeup: Sleek low bun, minimal natural makeup with a soft matte finish.
character.performance_style: Editorial stillness with a slow, controlled pivot; no exaggerated gestures; arms relaxed at sides.

scene.lighting: Soft warm commercial lighting with a subtle key from the front and gentle rim for edge definition.
scene.background: Cream cyclorama backdrop and matching warm cream runway floor; clean, audience-free; no additional set dressing.

product.visual_identity: A long oatmeal beige trench coat in silk-cotton faille with polished heritage details like epaulettes, storm flap, and a belted waist. Keep the coat plain and elegant; do not invent patterns or oversized logos.

single_shot.visual_prompt: A single elegant shot in a minimal editorial studio runway. Begin with the same model and scene as the first frame: the poised adult model already wearing the real oatmeal beige long trench coat, fully belted, standing centered on a warm cream runway with a cream cyclorama behind. The lighting is soft and warm, with a subtle frontal key and a gentle rim that defines the coat’s edges. The scene is quiet and uncluttered, with no audience and no extra props. The camera slowly pushes in as the model performs a measured, graceful pivot from a three-quarter stance toward a front-facing position. Keep arms relaxed at the sides and avoid exaggerated gestures. Let the silk-cotton faille surface catch the light softly, showing a refined drape without flutter or wind. As the camera nears a medium-full view, the model faces camera and holds a composed posture for a brief moment, emphasizing the belted waist, collar line, and long silhouette. Maintain stable lighting and minimal movement, ending on a still, premium portrait of the trench.
single_shot.start_frame_prompt: Transform the reference image of the real long oatmeal beige trench coat into an editorial full-scene frame. Show a poised adult fashion model already wearing the same coat, fully belted, on a warm cream runway with a cream cyclorama background. The composition is centered and elegant, with the model in a three-quarter stance, arms relaxed at sides. Lighting is soft and warm, with a gentle frontal key and subtle rim light to define the coat’s outline. The floor is a matte warm cream surface; the background is clean and audience-free with no furniture or props. The coat reads as silk-cotton faille, refined and smooth, with heritage details present but not exaggerated. No text or graphics in the scene.
single_shot.text:
Burberry Foxfield Trench
Silk–cotton faille. Refined oatmeal beige.
single_shot.audio: Subtle premium ambient score with soft piano tones; no voiceover; clean studio sound.
